_comment: Side-step maneuver demo: zoom in on the lone Spearmen (seed 12345, x=476.75/y=300 per Battle._spawn_line's widened spacing -- see demos/README.md, facing south toward the enemy), select it, then right-click a short step to the right. The click target (505, 300) is a ~28-unit shift, comfortably under UnitManeuver.SIDESTEP_MAX_DISTANCE (40.0), so the regiment SIDE-STEPS -- it shuffles right at a walk while holding its south-facing line, instead of centre-pivoting to face the move and pivoting back. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
